task: Can you help me make a simple checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow? I want it to be easy to follow tonight so I don’t forget anything in the morning.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple night-before checklist:

### Get Ready for School
- [ ] Finish homework
- [ ] Pack backpack
- [ ] Put papers/folders in bag
- [ ] Set out clothes
- [ ] Fill water bottle
- [ ] Put shoes by the door
- [ ] Check lunch or snack
- [ ] Set alarm

### Super short version
- [ ] Homework
- [ ] Backpack
- [ ] Clothes
- [ ] Water/lunch
- [ ] Alarm

If you want, I can make it into a **morning checklist** too.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Simple and not too much. I’d use the short version tonight.
